subject: Gaming
title: Nobuo Uematsu: Gaming's Mozart
description: A quick win: understand Nobuo Uematsu: Gaming's Mozart.

hook.text: Nobuo Uematsu never attended music school. He taught himself piano and became gaming's most celebrated composer.

buildup.text: Uematsu joined Square in 1986 as a part-time employee. He composed Final Fantasy's music as a side job.

discovery.text: Over 14 Final Fantasy games, Uematsu created hundreds of iconic tracks spanning every musical genre.

twist.text: ClassicFM ranked Uematsu alongside Beethoven and Mozart in their Hall of Fame. A game composer among legends.

climax.text: Uematsu proved that self-taught passion can produce music that stands alongside centuries of classical tradition.

punchline.text: No music school. Self-taught. Ranked alongside Beethoven and Mozart.

quiz.question: What is notable about Nobuo Uematsu's musical education?
options: He never attended music school and was entirely self-taught
He graduated from a top conservatory
He studied under a famous film composer
